name: tensory
description: Automatic long-term memory for coding agents. Recalls context on session start, saves learnings automatically.

OPENAI_API_KEY.title: OpenAI API Key
OPENAI_API_KEY.description: For embeddings (vector search). Without it only FTS + graph search work.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.title: Anthropic API Key
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: For LLM claim extraction. Without it, raw text is stored as-is.

ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL.title: Anthropic Base URL
ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL.description: Proxy URL (CLIProxyAPI, LiteLLM, etc.). Leave empty for direct API access.
